Kraken Energy has been a significant player in the energy industry since its inception in 2019. Over the years, the company has successfully completed hundreds of transactions, showcasing its operational strength and market dexterity. 

We look forward for the opportunity to work with you.

Interested in Selling Your Oil & Gas Interests?

Please fill out the following details and we will get back to you...

Professionals in the Oklahoma Oil & Gas Industry 

Operating primarily in Oklahoma, Purchasing Minerals Rights, Working Interests and Oil and Gas Leases, Kraken Energy has demonstrated remarkable success through its ability to adapt and intuitively navigate the ever-changing energy landscape.  This adaptability and keen intuition have enabled the company to expand its operations steadily, positioning it for continued growth and success in the future.

Scoop

Stack

SELLERS
BUYERS

Our Process is Quick and Easy

First and foremost, our clients are our number one priority. Whether we are purchasing from or selling to a client, we make sure the process is done with vigor and transparency, communicating with our clients through the entire process.

1.

Request an Offer

Give us a call at
(405) 697-7961. We will let you know the information we need.

2.

Gather
Information

3.

Evaluate 
and Appraise

4.

Receive 
Your Offer

Have Questions?

Please feel free to reach out! Hopefully we can answer any questions you might have.
